extraction.one_line_summary: DÉMARE Arnaud won Stage 4 in a chaotic sprint after CAVENDISH Mark crashed into barriers following contact with SAGAN Peter in final 200 meters.
tactical_patterns: DÉMARE's FDJ leadout rider diving out caused domino crash at 1.5km, eliminating rivals before final sprint positioning battle.
KITTEL Marcel positioned too far back in final kilometer, suggesting Quickstep train disrupted or mistimed their acceleration point.
SAGAN Peter's lateral movement under pressure indicatessprinters accept collision risk when boxed rather than conceding position in final 200m.
Sky protected FROOME in chaotic finale but THOMAS Geraint crashed, revealing GC team vulnerability when separated in sprint finishes.

rider_signals.DÉMARE Arnaud: positive: won first Tour stage with clean positioning while rivals crashed, proving fastest even without chaos eliminating competitors
rider_signals.CAVENDISH Mark: negative: attempted gap that wasn't there against barriers, shoulder injury suggests Tour abandonment likely, poor spatial judgment under pressure
rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: negative: disqualification under review for elbow contact and irregular sprint line, desperate lateral movement revealed positional deficit
rider_signals.KRISTOFF Alexander: positive: third place after navigating both crashes shows superior bike handling and positioning awareness in chaos
rider_signals.BOUHANNI Nacer: neutral: squeezed SAGAN left creating contact chain reaction, positioned well but trapped without escape room
rider_signals.KITTEL Marcel: negative: started sprint far too deep in bunch to contend, uncharacteristic positioning error suggests leadout train failure
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: negative: crashed in GC group showing Sky's vulnerability when protecting yellow jersey in sprint stage carnage
